items.title: Ruiz & Gavi's reward for World Cup win... 150kg of tomatoes
items.summary: Spain's Fabian Ruiz and Gavi receive their weight in tomatoes when they return to be honoured by their hometown Los Palacios y Villafranca.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: More delay in NSB formation; Sports Ministry extends deadline for applications
items.summary: The deadline for submission of applications for the selection of its chairman and members has been extended by 15 days, to August 8
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Commonwealth Games: 10 things to look out for at Glasgow 2026
